decks.notes: The deck focuses on quickly deploying aggressive creatures like Mogg Fanatic, Jackal Pup, and Quirion Dryad, while backing them up with efficient burn spells such as Lightning Bolt and Incinerate. The inclusion of cards like Sylvan Library and Rancor help to maintain card advantage and pump up the creatures for extra damage. Treetop Village provides a manland threat, while cards like Lava Dart and Grim Lavamancer offer additional reach and removal. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of early pressure and direct damage.

The deck focuses on quickly establishing a board presence with aggressive creatures like Nimble Mongoose and Terravore, backed up by disruption from cards like Swords to Plowshares and Wasteland. Armageddon is used to disrupt the opponent's mana base while also benefiting the deck as it runs few lands. The deck aims to generate quick wins by overwhelming the opponent with creatures and land destruction, utilizing cards like Sylvan Library and Rishadan Port for card advantage and control.

This deck focuses on aggressive plays using mono black creatures and removal spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. By using cards like Dark Ritual, Hypnotic Specter, and Knight of Stromgald, the deck aims to apply pressure early on and disrupt the opponent's hand with Duress and Cabal Therapy. Withered Wretch and Nantuko Shade offer additional threats while Graveborn Muse provides card advantage. The inclusion of Mishra's Factory and Wasteland helps to maintain board control. Overall, the strategy revolves around efficiently using resources to push towards a fast victory.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm opponents with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing efficient creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Knight of Stromgald, along with removal spells such as Smother and Diabolic Edict, the deck aims to apply early pressure and disrupt the opponent's game plan. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Cabal Therapy and Duress helps to strip the opponent's hand of key cards, giving Mono Black Aggro the upper hand in the early game and securing a swift victory.

This deck's focus is on dealing damage quickly and efficiently to the opponent, utilizing consistent burn spells like Lightning Bolt, Flame Rift, and Incinerate. The inclusion of cards like Grim Lavamancer and Mogg Fanatic allow for additional creature damage, while Pyrostatic Pillar punishes opponents for casting spells. With a low mana curve and minimal reliance on creatures, this Aggro - Sligh (RDW) deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with direct damage and pressure, ultimately leading to a swift victory.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with a swarm of aggressive goblin creatures. By using cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to search for key goblin cards, players can establish a powerful board presence early in the game. The inclusion of Goblin King and Goblin Warchief provide additional buffs to strengthen the goblin army, while cards like Siege-Gang Commander and Gempalm Incinerator offer additional removal options to control the board. Overall, this deck strives to quickly build a dominant board state and push for a fast victory against the opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to use Ill-Gotten Gains in combination with various combo pieces like Brain Freeze and Lion's Eye Diamond to quickly mill out your opponent's deck. With the help of cards like Dark Ritual and Cabal Ritual, you can generate mana quickly to cast your combo spells. Cards like Intuition and Cunning Wish help you search for specific combo pieces, while cards like Deep Analysis provide card draw to help you find your combo pieces faster. Overall, this deck focuses on assembling a powerful combo to win the game in a premodern 1 vs 1 format.

The key concept of this deck is to control the game by utilizing powerful counterspells such as Counterspell and Mana Leak, while also utilizing land destruction cards like Dust Bowl to disrupt the opponent's mana base. The deck aims to maintain board control with cards like Standstill and Sweepers like Wrath of God, while generating card advantage with cards like Fact or Fiction. The win condition is typically through incremental advantage and finishing the game with a powerful threat like Exalted Angel or Decree of Justice.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle combo to create a powerful board presence that can overwhelm the opponent. It utilizes countermagic and card selection spells to protect the combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan. The deck aims to efficiently control the game until it can set up the combo and win the game in a single explosive turn.

The deck focuses on using the card Replenish to bring back multiple enchantments from the graveyard, such as Parallax Wave and Opalescence, to create a powerful board presence and overwhelm the opponent. The deck also includes control elements like Mana Leak and Tsabo's Web to disrupt the opponent's strategy while setting up the combo. The goal is to quickly assemble the necessary pieces and execute the combo to secure victory. The deck has a strong synergy between its cards and aims to outmaneuver the opponent with its powerful enchantment-based strategy.

The deck is built around the aggressive strategy of quickly flooding the board with Goblin creatures to overwhelm the opponent. Key cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Warchief help accelerate the deck by reducing costs and allowing for early creature drops. Support cards like Siege-Gang Commander and Goblin Ringleader provide additional creature power and card advantage. The deck also includes disruption elements like Wasteland and Rishadan Port to slow down the opponent's strategies. Overall, the deck aims to win through fast and consistent creature damage.

This deck focuses on assembling the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful win condition. The deck contains a high number of cantrips and counter spells to protect the combo pieces and ensure they can be safely deployed. Additionally, there are disruptive cards like Misdirection and Thwart to further control the game and protect the combo. Overall, the goal of the deck is to efficiently dig for combo pieces while disrupting the opponent's game plan in order to secure a victory.

This deck aims to disrupt and control the opponent's game plan by using a combination of removal spells like Swords to Plowshares and Vindicate, along with hand disruption cards like Duress. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Exalted Angel and Eternal Dragon to close out the game. Dust Bowl provides additional land destruction while Skeletal Scrying helps with card advantage. Haunting Echoes and Infest can serve as board wipes against creature-heavy decks. Overall, the deck focuses on maintaining control of the game through targeted removal and disruption spells.

This deck focuses on swarming the board with aggressive Goblin creatures, quickly overwhelming the opponent with sheer numbers and powerful synergy. By utilizing cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to fetch key creatures, as well as Goblin Warchief to reduce their cost, the deck aims to establish an early board presence and maintain pressure throughout the game. Supporting cards like Rishadan Port and Wasteland help to disrupt the opponent's strategy, while cards like Gempalm Incinerator and Siege-Gang Commander provide additional removal and reach to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and disruptive spells, while controlling the game with discard and removal. By utilizing efficient creatures like Hypnotic Specter and Nantuko Shade, along with powerful disruption cards like Duress and Cabal Therapy, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent early and maintain dominance throughout the game. The inclusion of Wasteland and Mishra's Factory also allows for additional disruption and versatility in dealing with opposing threats. Overall, the deck is designed to be fast, disruptive, and relentless in its attack.

The deck focuses on using a combination of disruptive spells and efficient creatures to control the game and outvalue the opponent. By utilizing cards like Cabal Therapy, Duress, and Pernicious Deed to disrupt the opponent's strategy, combined with threats like Treetop Village and Ravenous Rats to apply pressure, the deck aims to grind out the opponent and eventually overwhelm them with powerful plays like Living Death. The inclusion of a toolbox of creatures like Wall of Blossoms and Spore Frog provides utility and flexibility in various situations.
